name: testGetTestUnitName
title: testGetTestUnitName
description: Returns the name of the test unit. After your call of this function the name will be inside the character array testUnitName. The maximum length of the name is the length of the character array. This length will be saved in bufferSize.

parameters.name: testUnitName
parameters.description: This character array contains the answer after calling the function.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: This parameter saves the length of the character array.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
